"[53] C73-047 CT 97 IF OUT OF AREA INQ W/ CT ENRT F HARD CLOSURE [Shared]"

"[27] DUP CLR ADV MM 25-26 IN THE CD [Shared]"
"[21] O/T SEMI LOOKS LIKE DRY BOX REEFER - NEG 1125 IN DIRT IN CD [Shared]"
"[12] [Appended, 02:15:40] [4] RED CAB WHI TRLR O/T ON ITS SIDE"
"[1] ^COLD,DRY,STRONG WINDS, TRAVEL ADVISORY FOR ALL VEHICLES"
